testInfo.summary: This test case verifies proper nonce replay protection. It first completes a successful credential issuance flow, then attempts a second credential request using the same nonce/proof. The credential issuer must reject the replayed nonce with an invalid_nonce error (HTTP 400). Note: This test requires a credential configuration that requires cryptographic binding (proof). If the selected credential configuration does not require proof, the test will be skipped.
